title: Dimmable E27 Screw Led Bulb 1600 Lumens 12 Watt Replaces 100W / 120W Incandescent, Warm White 2700K No Flickering Energy Saving Light Bulb, 360°Beam Angle AC 220-240V Edison Bulb (Pack of 3)
features: NOTE:Please note the selection of the specified dimmer

💯⭐【Energy Saving Bulb】Replace 120W incandescent bulbs with the 12W LED light bulb E27, saving over 90% on the electricity bill. 20000 hours lifespan reduce the frequency of changing bulbs. E energy efficiency (2021 rules）

💯⭐【95% Perfect Performance 】Dimmable light bulbs to adjust attractive brightness at any time. Instant on, 2700K warm white with 1600lm brightness, 360°beam angle, nice even warm light, creating a cozy atmosphere.

💯⭐【100% Ultra Bright 】These 1600 Lumens E27 Light Bulbs , as bright as 120W traditional bulbs that can totally light up every corner. CRI over 80 provides vivid and natural colour and extra warm light effect.

💯⭐【Wide Application】 Standard E27 base and easy to replace old incandescent or CFL light bulb. Widely applied in chandelier light, ceiling fans, pendants, desk lamps, and so on. It also fits for bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom, meeting room, office, shopping mall, dining room, coffee shop, hotels, etc.

💯⭐【Reliable Quality】UKCA and CE certification, no lead or mercury, no UV or IR Radiation, No flickering, No buzzing or humming, no harm for your health, keeps you away from sight-damage, eye-fatigue, and annoying noise.
💯⭐【Durable Customer Service】You'll get 3 x Bulbs with exquisite and strong packaging. Customer First is our belief, if you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us directly.

ST58 12W E27 DIMMABLE Merchant video Vintage LED Edison bulbs, dimmable, high brightness, warm white, 2700 K These Edison bulbs are carefully crafted to resemble the retro incandescent style, manufactured with the most advanced high lumen LED filament technology. Dimmable E27 12W LED bulb replacement for 120W incandescent bulb The ST19 shape gives any space, whether contemporary or industrial, a soft, warm glow and is used in many areas, such as homes, offices, shopping centres, museums and art spaces, cafés, restaurants, bedrooms, schools, clubs and other places. Wide range of application scenarios Safe to use and eye protection No mercury, UV or IR radiation. Non-flickering light and no glare prevent eye strain, short-sightedness and headaches, creating a pleasant, cosy atmosphere for you and your family. LED E27 bulb, warm white, dimmable Why choose the Century Light ST19/ST58 LED lamp? 1. Reduce the hassle of frequent bulb replacement Century Light's LED bulb can be used for 18 years and can be dimmed for any scene. 2. More energy-efficient LED bulbs The effect used is a 120W incandescent bulb, but you only have to pay for 12W. 3. Constant brightness, no flickering or flashing We confirm that all our products are made of high-quality materials, non-toxic, mercury-free, UV-free and hum-free. 4. 2700 K soft warm white Creates a cosy and relaxing atmosphere for you, where you will feel more comfortable and at ease. 3 x LED dimmable E26 ST58 12W incandescent bulbs, warm white 2700K Different brightness levels illuminate every corner of your home, eliminating the need to consider other bulbs. NOTE: This E LED bulb is dimmable. It requires the specified dimmer; if the dimmer is not compatible, the product will flicker or buzz and damage the bulb. Vintage Retro Edison LED Bulbs No dark areas with a 360° beam angle Our Edison bulbs shine 360 degrees, no shadows, bright but not dazzling.
